```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;">

 <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FFB84D,#C4881A);border-radius:20px;padding:1.6em 1.4em 1.5em;box-shadow:0 14px 40px rgba(196,136,26,0.32);">

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#FFF;opacity:0.85;letter-spacing:0.22em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.6em;">— practice 01 —</div>

  <div style="font-size:1.5em;font-weight:800;color:#FFF;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:0.95em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;">
   Install all three tools.
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;text-align:left;">

   <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.16);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35);border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.7em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#FFF;opacity:0.85;letter-spacing:0.12em;margin-bottom:0.3em;">CLAUDE CODE</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#FFF;font-weight:600;">→ <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.95em;">claude</code> runs in terminal</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.16);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35);border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.7em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#FFF;opacity:0.85;letter-spacing:0.12em;margin-bottom:0.3em;">POSITRON</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#FFF;font-weight:600;">→ launches and opens</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.16);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35);border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.7em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#FFF;opacity:0.85;letter-spacing:0.12em;margin-bottom:0.3em;">SPOKENLY</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#FFF;font-weight:600;">→ hotkey produces text</div>
   </div>

  </div>

  <div style="margin-top:1em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#FFF;opacity:0.85;letter-spacing:0.1em;">
   ⏱ ~ 5 min &nbsp;·&nbsp; raise hand if stuck
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
